chunks.text: We find out what makes you tick and what keeps you awake at night. We develop and implement creative, integrated, tailored solutions across media, public affairs, reputation management, stakeholder engagement, events, social, brand and coaching to ensure your message lands with the right people. We continuously measure our effectiveness. If it works, w.

We do the heavy-lifting so you can invest your time and resources in your business. And we deliver exceptional results, time and time again. What We Do. Our approach is simple – we listen, plan, engage and deliver. From our first conversation with you, we will quickly identify the type of support you need and deploy a dedicated team of consultants to work with you. We immerse ourselves in your business and we get to know your people.

We create awareness, protect reputations, solve problems and change behaviours through communications. We focus on issues of societal importance – climate change, housing, renting, health, local Government – and we build and implement strategies that change attitudes and behaviours. Our work brings us into daily contact with media, political representatives and key influencers throughout Ireland and the EU. We know how to communicate complex issues simply.

With a focus on small group sizes, we foster an environment that encourages maximum interaction, practical applicati

High Impact Open Programmes. 0 + Open Courses Run 0 + Participants 0 + Years of Delivery 0 + Repeat Participants Our Open Programmes are delivered through a combination of in-person workshops and interactive virtual sessions, ensuring flexibility and convenience.

Our programmes deliver real and measurable improvements in performance, ensuring that each participant leaves with actionable insights, enhanced skills and behaviours, ready to apply their learning in the world of work. Our programmes are designed to foster interactive learning through practical exercises, real-world case studies, and collaborative discussions to ensure a focused learning environment.

These are open to all and can be booked by individuals looking to upskill and get ahead in their careers. Ivanna Katz EU Project Manager Johnny Fallon Strategy Director A proud Longford man Johnny has worked in PR and Public Affairs for over 20 years. With a focus on strategic and crisis communication he has advised clients in the public and private sector and is much sought after as a trainer for media and presentation skills.

She is a full member of the Public Relations Institute of Ireland (MPRII). In her spare time Marie will never be seen without a cup of coffee and a book, she is always trying out new recipes and adding a healthy twist to them as she has a passion for health, fitness and cooking. Marie is also a qualified beauty therapist, she always had an interest in this industry and completed this alongside her full-time work as a pastime.

She leads our PR and European Projects teams, overseeing 20 talented individuals who support over 40 clients. A mum of two, when she’s not crafting strategies, she’s cheering her kids on at GAA matches or singing ‘Stand Up and Fight’ at Thomond Park. Anthony O'Callaghan Executive Administrator Marie Lynch Account Director Marie holds a degree in English, Sociology and Politics (BA) from NUI Galway and PRII Diploma in Public Relations.

" Marketing Manager, Pharmaceuticals TESTIMONIAL "I’ve been on a few of these over the course of my career but this was quite simply the best. Thank you. " Head of Department, Education sector TESTIMONIAL "The course provided me with the tools to deliver engaging presentations. My trainer was so knowledgeable and supportive.

By the end of the course you will be able to: Identify and meet the needs of an audience Reach your objectives with your presentation Handle nerves Prepare effectively for your presentations Use PowerPoint effectively Be interesting, understandable and memorable Deliver successful presentations "An invaluable experience that boosted my confidence in public speaking. The practical tips and personalised feedback were incredibly helpful.

Confidence Building: Develop the confidence to present in any setting, whether in-person or virtually. Tailored Training: Benefit from tailored training that meets individual needs through pre-course preparation and personalised feedback.

Our track record: We have been helping people deliver highly effective presentations for over 50 years. Expert Instruction: Learn from experienced professionals with a proven capability in effective communication and presentation. Interactive Learning: Engage in hands-on exercises and receive personalised feedback to enhance your skills. Comprehensive Content: Gain insights into every presentation aspect, from preparation to delivery and handling questions.

The course provides: Methods to guarantee audiences pick up and retain what’s important in your presentation An effective and proven approach to preparation for public speaking Personal pointers to help you measurably improve your authority, confidence and presence All the information you want about delivery, body language and use of presentation technology Methods to avoid presentation pitfalls Techniques for handling notes and props Why Choose Our Presentation Skills Workshop.
Whether you need to present in person or virtually, this course provides the essential tools and techniques to engage your audience and deliver your message with impact.
